blocked_reason: No Adobe credentials configured. FIREFLY_CLIENT_ID and FIREFLY_CLIENT_SECRET not set.
anchor_prompt: Luxury men's leather oxford shoe on dark slate surface, dramatic side lighting, warm gold highlights, shallow depth of field, studio photography, premium product shot

credential_requirements.FIREFLY_CLIENT_ID: Required. Get from Adobe Developer Console.
credential_requirements.FIREFLY_CLIENT_SECRET: Required. Get from Adobe Developer Console.

notes: Skill and CLI script are fully built. Batch generation with style reference is supported. Just needs Adobe Developer Console credentials to execute. Free tier includes limited generative credits; enterprise plans have higher volume.
